title: Pipeline flowing at all 4 stages
evidence: price-updates: +258, opportunities: +12526, execution-requests: at MAXLEN cap (5001->5002, trimmed), execution-results: at MAXLEN cap (5000->5001, trimmed). DLQ: 0 growth.
actual: All flowing. Execution streams at MAXLEN with active trimming = throughput at capacity.

title: Drawdown state changed from NORMAL to CAUTION during smoke test
evidence: Pre-smoke: riskState=NORMAL, positionSizeMultiplier=1. Post-smoke: riskState=CAUTION (75% sizing). 8292 attempts, 7037 successes, 1250 failures. Success rate 84.8% but enough consecutive losses to trigger CAUTION.
recommendation: Review simulation mock to ensure balanced win/loss distribution. In simulation mode the drawdown breaker should not be triggering CAUTION. Check if simulated losses are clustering.

title: Backpressure correctly active at 100% stream fill
evidence: executionStreamDepthRatio=1.0002, active=true. execution-requests XLEN=5000 = MAXLEN(5000). Coordinator correctly throttling.
actual: Active at 100.02% (stream at cap) - correct behavior
recommendation: No action needed - flow control working as designed

title: All 4 partitions actively processing during smoke test
evidence: P1 +1289 events, P2 +3233 events, P3 +582 events, P4 +15120 events. All positive deltas, all chains producing data.
actual: All active with varying throughput (P4/Solana highest at 15120)

title: All 13 chains active across 4 partitions
evidence: P1: BSC=4952, Polygon=2429, AVAX=6033, FTM=1587. P2: ARB=11824, OP=3424, Base=7455, Scroll=1899, Blast=613. P3: ETH=5632, zkSync=1240, Linea=1538. P4: Solana=123480.

title: Trace context not propagated in execution results
evidence: Latest execution result has traceId=none, fields=[data]. Result wrapped in single data JSON field - trace context not in top-level stream fields.
actual: No trace context visible in execution results
recommendation: Verify trace context propagation in execution result publisher. The data field may contain nested trace info.

title: Zero DLQ growth during smoke test
evidence: DLQ: 0->0, Forwarding-DLQ: 0->0. No messages failed during pipeline flow.

evidence: stream-monitor.js not present in monitor-session directory
